extra.reason: Merged in PR #243. Renamed helpers/ -> workspace/ in both @barwise/cli and @barwise/mcp (git mv, history preserved; ~17 mcp + ~17 cli import sites rewritten). Option A decision (with owner): the output-formatting modules (CLI format.ts, MCP response.ts) STAY in workspace/ rather than splitting into a render/ folder -- a file-per-folder change with little payoff. Pure move, no logic change: full suite green, depcruise + purity pass. One follow-up fix landed in the same PR -- dprint sorts export declarations by specifier, so server.ts's re-export needed moving after the ./tools/* exports (workspace > tools, where helpers < tools).
